title: Invisible Item Frames With Interaction Range Increase
description: No crafting required. This will give players invisible and visible item frames. Frames have enchanted effect, and provide buffs including increased block+entity interaction range in main-hand, and run speed in off-hand.
body:
# MxSxC1 - Invisible Item Frames Buffed With Interaction & Speed

## **Pack Purpose**

**Gives Player Enchanted & Fully Placeable Invisible & Item Frames.*

**Holding Item Frames Increases Interaction Range.*

**Holding Item Frames Increases Interaction Range.*

**Holding Item Frames Off-Hand Increases Run Speed.*

**Optional Permanent Interaction Range Increase.*

NOTE: Manual currently broken in 1.21.5 - working on a fix for this. Caused by change in formatting in 1.21.5

### This will work on 1.21 and above!

**If you are sick of all videos, tutorials, item generators and searching providing nothing but nonsense and lies? This works on latest versions using latest correct format and attribute modifiers.**

## Item Frames
- All Item Frames Are Enchanted & Placeable
- Give Invisible Item Frames
- Give Visible Item Frames
- All Item Frames Give Buffs (Entity & Block Interaction Range Interaction range while frame held in main hand)
- - All Item Frames Give Buffs (run speed while frame held in off hand)
- Permament & Optional Block & Entity Interaction Range Increase (you don't need frame in hand)
- Stackable. Combining both of the above gives you massive range! (see screenshot for range)


No crafting recipe required! Others have done through crafting recipes, so we won't bother for now. This is something we use for level and scene design, not for single player/survival/multiplayer with non-Op (yet). We can do this in multiple ways, and better than requiring crafting - but our focus is on utility currently.

This is a sub-set of our "cosmetic" pack...

## Commands
```
/function mxinvframe:interact - Set additional interaction range

/function mxinvframe:invisframe - Give players invisible frame

/function mxinvframe:visframe - Give players visible frame
```

## Steps To Install & Update
Drop the pack into the following folder:
```
C:\Users\[UserName]\AppData\Roaming\.minecraft\saves\[GameSaveName]\datapacks\
```
## Notes / Issues / TODO / Work In progress / Future Versions

- Cycle/Toggle Interaction Ranges
- AoE Toggle - Function to toggle visibility
- AoE Toggle - Horn Trigger to toggle visibility
- Armour Toggle (wear an item to toggle visibility)
- Splash Toggle (potion/attack/projectile effects)
- Manual - Trigger From Book (Run functions directly from clickable pages within the manual)
- Item Placement
- Activation Horn
- OffHand Bonuses (Quick Swap Tool)
- Structure Placement
- Abstraction
- Set Pieces (requires Abstraction)
- Top Secret Insane Stuff (it is coming)
- Armour Sets
- Control Structure (this may be merged with MxSxC1 Cosmetic Pack, otherwise will work alongside it)
  
### WHAT THIS IS NOT:

This pack DOES NOT include custom textures, item frame custom texture, glowing effects, etc. That will be a separate pack.


Note that our videos and screenshots use around 25 packs, some unreleased, this pack does what it says, but does not include some of the other effects, textures, music, shaders, etc...you may see.

**MxSxC1**
The Dark Is A Cold Lonely Shadow
[https://www.miscreat.co.uk/](https://www.miscreat.co.uk/)
___

We do not create mods, we create packs and data packs within Mojangs framework, which will also work on Realms.

Never install any packs, mods, or anything without fully understanding what they do, and ensuring it's legitimate and safe! If anything requires elevation (which ours do not), think twice and verify!
